column1: # F3 (NAMES) in the F5 GOTO prompt.
# Manual: "After you press GOTO (F5), press NAME (F3) to display a list
# of range names in the current file…"
# Picking a name jumps the pointer to the range's start cell and returns
# to READY (mirrors GOTO's "go to a cell" behavior — for a multi-cell
# range, the start corner is the natural target).
# F5 GOTO → prompt → F3 opens name list.
ASSERT_PANEL_L3   Enter address to go to
# Enter picks `block`, jumps to its start corner, returns to READY.
# Esc from the name list returns to the underlying GOTO prompt.
ASSERT_PANEL_L3   Enter address to go to
